summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of action buttons with dropdown menus on Inventory, Stock Transfers, Returns, and CRM pages. All features working correctly - dropdown menus open properly, View Details modals display correct information, Adjust Stock modal works, and delete confirmation dialogs appear on all pages.
passed_tests: Inventory page - Actions column with MoreVertical (⋮) icon present
Inventory page - Dropdown menu opens with View Details, Adjust Stock, Delete Record options
Inventory page - View Details modal shows Item Name, Store, Variant, SKU, Current Quantity, Purchase Rate, Total Value, Status
Inventory page - Adjust Stock modal shows item info, Current Stock, Quantity Adjustment field, Purchase Rate field
Inventory page - Delete confirmation dialog appears with item name and store
Stock Transfers page - Actions column with MoreVertical (⋮) icon present
Stock Transfers page - Dropdown menu opens with View Details, Download PDF, Delete Transfer options
Stock Transfers page - Approve/Reject options appear for pending transfers
Stock Transfers page - View Details modal shows From Store, To Store, Status, Date, Items list, Notes
Stock Transfers page - Delete confirmation dialog appears with transfer number
Returns page - Actions column with MoreVertical (⋮) icon present
Returns page - Dropdown menu opens with View Details, Approve (for pending), Delete options
Returns page - View Details modal shows Return #, Invoice #, Customer, Status, Date, Refund Method, Reason, Returned Items, Return Amount
Returns page - Delete confirmation dialog appears with return number
CRM page - Actions column with MoreVertical (⋮) icon present
CRM page - Dropdown menu opens with View Details, Edit Customer, Add Note, Delete Customer options
CRM page - View Customer modal shows customer name, segment badge, Email, Phone, Total Spend, Orders, Avg. Order, Last Order, Loyalty Points
CRM page - Delete confirmation dialog appears with customer name

inventory_page.actions_column: WORKING - MoreVertical icon in Actions column
inventory_page.dropdown_menu: WORKING - View Details, Adjust Stock, Delete Record
inventory_page.view_details_modal: WORKING - Shows quantity, rate, value, status
inventory_page.adjust_stock_modal: WORKING - Shows current stock, quantity adjustment, purchase rate fields
inventory_page.delete_confirmation: WORKING - Confirms with item name and store

stock_transfers_page.actions_column: WORKING - MoreVertical icon in Actions column
stock_transfers_page.dropdown_menu: WORKING - View Details, Download PDF, Delete Transfer
stock_transfers_page.view_details_modal: WORKING - Shows transfer info and items list

returns_page.actions_column: WORKING - MoreVertical icon in Actions column

crm_page.actions_column: WORKING - MoreVertical icon in Actions column
crm_page.dropdown_menu: WORKING - View Details, Edit Customer, Add Note, Delete Customer
crm_page.view_customer_modal: WORKING - Shows full customer info with purchase stats

critical_code_review_comments: All four pages use consistent DropdownMenu pattern from shadcn/ui
data-testid attributes follow consistent naming pattern: {page}-actions-{id}
Delete confirmations use window.confirm() with descriptive messages
View Details modals display comprehensive information for each entity type
Dropdown menus have proper separators before destructive actions (Delete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Action buttons with dropdown menus have been added to Inventory, Stock Transfers, Returns, and CRM pages. All use consistent DropdownMenu pattern with MoreVertical icon. Each page has View Details modal, edit/adjust functionality, and delete confirmation. All features working correctly.
